final:
module top_module(

input wire iRead,
input wire iWrite,
input wire[7:0]iDataRAM,

input wire[7:0]iDataALU,
input wire [7:0]iRegister,
output wire [7:0]oRegister

) ;assign oRegister= (iRead||iWrite) ? ( iRead ? iDataRAM:iDataALU)  :iRegister;






  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      oRegister <= iRegister;
    end
  end

endmodule
